creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 230247
v1

Moin moin 

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to switch Qt5 to KDE as upstream.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-Qt-Switch-Qt5-to-use-KDE-s-Qt-patch-collection.patch



mfg Tobias
